items.definition_en: A suitcase is a large bag with a handle used for carrying clothes and things when you travel.
items.example_en: She packed her clothes in a suitcase for the trip.

items.definition_en: A backpack is a bag you carry on your back to hold your things.
items.example_en: He took a backpack for his hiking trip.

items.definition_en: A carry-on is a small bag you can take with you on a plane.
items.example_en: She put her laptop in her carry-on.

items.definition_en: A duffel bag is a soft, large bag used for travel or sports.
items.example_en: He packed his clothes in a duffel bag.

items.definition_en: Luggage is the bags and suitcases you take with you when you travel.
items.example_en: Her luggage was too heavy to carry alone.

items.definition_en: A toiletry bag is a small bag for keeping soap and other personal items.
items.example_en: He packed his toothbrush in his toiletry bag.

items.definition_en: A passport is a small official book that shows your identity and country.
items.example_en: She showed her passport at the airport.

items.definition_en: A suit cover is a thin bag to protect clothes during travel.
items.example_en: He used a suit cover for his jacket.

items.definition_en: A travel pillow is a small pillow used to support your head while travelling.
items.example_en: She brought a travel pillow for the flight.

items.definition_en: A packing cube is a small bag to organize clothes in your suitcase.
items.example_en: Packing cubes keep my clothes neat.

items.definition_en: A zipper bag is a plastic bag that closes with a zip for keeping small things.
items.example_en: I put my liquids in a zipper bag.

items.definition_en: A lock is a device you use to keep your luggage safe.
items.example_en: He put a lock on his suitcase.

items.definition_en: A tag is a label with your name on your luggage.
items.example_en: Her bag had a name tag.

items.definition_en: A strap is a long piece for carrying or closing a bag.
items.example_en: He tightened the strap on his backpack.

items.definition_en: A wheel is a round object that helps a suitcase move easily.
items.example_en: Her suitcase has broken wheels.

items.definition_en: A zipper is a device for closing bags or clothes.
items.example_en: The zipper on my bag is broken.

items.definition_en: A compartment is a small space for keeping things separated in a bag.
items.example_en: My suitcase has a special compartment for shoes.

items.definition_en: A handle is a part of a bag you hold to carry it.
items.example_en: She pulled her suitcase by the handle.

items.definition_en: A pocket is a small bag sewn inside or outside of your luggage.
items.example_en: I keep my passport in an outside pocket.

items.definition_en: A sticker is a piece of paper you stick on your luggage for decoration or information.
items.example_en: He put a sticker on his suitcase.
